name: space-cooking-adventure
description: 太空料理 - 轻松搞笑的章节,Stella尝试用盖亚食材创造美味食物,结果既有灾难也有惊喜
capabilities: Play as Stella Chen in a structured narrative with five distinct story phases
Generate humorous cooking disaster scenarios with alien ingredients
Create emotionally engaging character interactions and internal monologue
Adapt story flow based on user responses while maintaining character consistency
Provide multiple ending branches based on narrative choices
Balance comedy with genuine emotional moments and character development
author: ClaudeCode-NPC
securitySummary: All 28 static findings are false positives from markdown formatting patterns. The skill contains only narrative text with no executable code, network requests, or file system access. This is a safe interactive storytelling skill with no security concerns.
valueStatement: Experience a light-hearted narrative adventure where you guide Stella Chen through comedic cooking attempts on an alien planet. This interactive storytelling skill provides entertaining role-play with humor, creativity, and emotional depth.
userTitle: Play Interactive Space Cooking Story with Claude
limitations: Follows a predefined story structure with limited narrative flexibility
Requires suspension of disbelief for science fiction elements
Story is in mixed Chinese and English requiring bilingual comprehension
Does not generate custom recipes or provide actual cooking instructions

useCases.title: Creative Writing Practice
useCases.description: Writers can study character voice, comedic timing, and narrative pacing through this structured example of interactive fiction.

useCases.title: Interactive Entertainment
useCases.description: Users seeking engaging storytelling can experience a complete narrative chapter with humor, emotion, and character development.

useCases.targetUser: Tabletop RPG players and game masters
useCases.title: Role-Playing Reference
useCases.description: Game masters and role-players can use this as a template for creating character-driven scenarios with clear emotional arcs.

promptTemplates.title: Start the Story
promptTemplates.prompt: Begin the space cooking adventure with Stella
promptTemplates.scenario: Launch the narrative from the beginning with Stella deciding to cook real food

promptTemplates.title: Try a Specific Recipe
promptTemplates.prompt: Have Stella attempt to make a fruit salad with alien ingredients
promptTemplates.scenario: Jump to a specific cooking attempt within the story

promptTemplates.title: Focus on Character Emotion
promptTemplates.prompt: Show Stella reflecting on how food connects to home and humanity
promptTemplates.scenario: Explore the deeper emotional themes of the narrative

promptTemplates.title: Generate Alternative Ending
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a version where Stella shares her cooking with alien species Eos
promptTemplates.scenario: Develop the cultural exchange ending branch

bestPractices: Allow the narrative to progress through all five phases for complete character arc
Engage with character reactions and emotional beats rather than rushing through events
Appreciate the bilingual dialogue as part of character authenticity and cultural identity
antiPatterns: Requesting technical cooking instructions or real recipes instead of narrative experience
Trying to change core character traits or backstory established in the skill
Skipping directly to successful outcomes without experiencing the comedic failures

faq.question: What is this skill designed to do?
faq.answer: This skill guides Claude Code to perform as Stella Chen in an interactive narrative adventure focused on cooking attempts during space survival. It provides structured storytelling with humor, character development, and emotional depth.

faq.question: Do I need to understand both Chinese and English?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill uses mixed language dialogue to reflect the character's bilingual background. Key story elements are understandable in both languages, but full comprehension requires bilingual reading ability.

faq.question: Can I modify the story or character?
faq.answer: The narrative follows a predefined structure with established character traits. While you can influence pacing and specific choices, core story elements and character personality remain consistent with the skill definition.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for all audiences?
faq.answer: The content is light-hearted and appropriate for general audiences. It includes mild peril and animal hunting for food in a survival context, presented with respect and emotional awareness.

faq.question: How long does the story take to complete?
faq.answer: The skill is designed for a complete experience that progresses through five phases with multiple story beats, creating a satisfying narrative arc with beginning, middle, and conclusion.

faq.question: What makes this different from regular chatting with Claude?
faq.answer: The skill provides structured role-play guidelines, specific character voice, predefined story phases, and comedic timing frameworks that create a consistent narrative experience rather than freeform conversation.
